eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Inyo, CA; at 7:02 PM on JUL 20, 2026 Effective until 7:02 PM JUL 21, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Evacuation Order in place for an active wild fire for the South Fish Springs/Aberdeen Area.  Evacuate immediately. Unknown duration for order. Evacuation Order in place for an active wild fire for the South Fish Springs/Aberdeen Area.  Evacuate immediately. Unknown duration for order.
